title: Persistent Systems is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Persistent Systems is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Persistent Systems in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Persistent Systems:
Persistent Systems is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems!
